whoTheyAre: Brooklyn Steel Co. is a kitchen appliance brand inspired by Brooklyn's creative energy. Their flagship Talos 20 Espresso Machine brings café-quality brewing, built-in grinding, and milk frothing to home kitchens.
challenge: Home espresso is a considered purchase — customers need to understand features before committing $499.
The brand's Brooklyn-inspired identity had to come through in every scroll, not just product photos.
Bundle and accessory merchandising needed to support higher average order values.
Brew Guides and educational content were needed to reduce post-purchase uncertainty.
built: Shopify storefront with a feature-education product page for the Talos 20 (grind settings, pressure gauge, steam wand, dual spout).
Visual feature cards that explain capabilities in benefit language, not spec sheets.
Mix-and-match bundle builder for limited-edition coffee cup collections.
Machines, Mugs, and Accessories collection pages with Brooklyn-branded typography and tone.
Brew Guides content section for post-purchase confidence.
impact: Product education reduces purchase hesitation for a premium appliance.
Brand storytelling reinforces Brooklyn Steel's unique café-at-home positioning.
Bundle merchandising supports higher average order values.
Brew Guides build loyalty and reduce return risk.
whyMatters: If you sell a product that requires explanation before purchase, your website is your best salesperson. SWFT builds storefronts that educate, inspire, and convert — so visitors become confident buyers, not confused browsers.
